description: Note signed by Yaʿaqov Ṣarfati stating that Shimʿon will give 8.5 of something to the holy congregation of בטאת(?). Dated: Wednesday, 3 Rabīʿ II, דעצה(?). Late. This small note was written on the back of a piece of paper cut from Judaeo-Arabic accounts (which mention David Ḥazzan and David Shammash).
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
